Description: Many buildings are old and not designed to be energy efficient, making it difficult to implement new technologies and reduce energy consumption.
Lots of competition in the energy market, which can make it difficult for new technologies to gain traction and for companies to differentiate themselves.
The energy market is often dominated by a few large providers, which can limit competition and innovation in the industry.
The energy industry has a significant impact on the environment, and there is a growing need to transition to cleaner and more sustainable energy sources.

Issue Name: Nuclear Modules with extra long title
Description: Nuclear modules are a promising technology for generating clean energy, but they can be expensive and difficult to implement, especially in areas with limited infrastructure.
